prompt: Review file upload endpoint with path traversal, TODO stubs, and missing validation — should produce NEEDS CHANGES.

assertions.text: Output shows all 3 stages: finder scan, adversary challenges, and referee ruling
Finder identifies path traversal risk (filename not sanitized)
Finder flags the TODO comments as incomplete implementation / integrity violation
Finder identifies missing file type/size validation
Each issue has a severity: BLOCKER, WARNING, or SUGGESTION
Referee resolves any disputes and produces final list
